Drop the approved portrait of Musa C. Mseleku here as:

    musa-portrait.jpg

It is referenced by /src/assets/imageManifest.js as IMAGES.about and rendered
by the About section. Once the file is in this folder, the dev server will
hot-reload and show it automatically.

Recommended:
- Format: .jpg or .webp (smaller file size)
- Dimensions: at least 1200px on the long edge for retina sharpness
- Aspect ratio: 4:5 portrait works best in the layout, but the CSS
  uses object-cover so any ratio will fill cleanly.

Usage note (since this is a private concept):
- Confirm you have the right to use this image before any public launch.
- Public-figure press headshots are commonly distributed for editorial use,
  but the safest path before publishing is to obtain explicit written
  permission from Musa or his team.
